items.title: Israel and Lebanon agree 10-day ceasefire, Trump says
items.dek: The US president invites the two countries' leaders to Washington as Israel's prime minister insists troops will not leave southern Lebanon.
items.body: The US president invites the two countries' leaders to Washington as Israel's prime minister insists troops will not leave southern Lebanon.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Artemis II crew describes Moon mission and splashdown moment
items.dek: The crew held its first press conference since splashing down from their historic 10-day trip.
items.body: The crew held its first press conference since splashing down from their historic 10-day trip.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Judge grants Oklahoma LB Heinecke extra year
items.dek: A district court judge has granted Oklahoma linebacker Owen Heinecke a preliminary injunction, handing him an additional year of eligibility in 2026.
items.body: A district court judge has granted Oklahoma linebacker Owen Heinecke a preliminary injunction, handing him an additional year of eligibility in 2026.
items.author: IriLine Desk
